description: Op-shaped job that emits OpenLineage RunEvent (START / COMPLETE) per Dagster run to a configured collector (Marquez, OpenLineage Proxy, Datakin, etc.)

tags.label: Job Tags
tags.description: Dagster job tags as key-value pairs.

endpoint_env_var.label: Endpoint Env Var
endpoint_env_var.description: Env var holding the OpenLineage collector URL (e.g. http://marquez:5000/api/v1/lineage).

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var with a bearer token if the collector requires auth.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.description: OpenLineage namespace. Events from this code location group under this string.

ol_job_name.label: OpenLineage Job Name
ol_job_name.description: Job name as seen in OpenLineage. Defaults to job_name.

producer.label: Producer URI
producer.description: OpenLineage producer URI identifying the emitter.

inputs_template.label: Inputs Template
inputs_template.description: Static inputs list to attach to each event, e.g. [{'namespace': 'snowflake', 'name': 'analytics.public.orders'}].

outputs_template.label: Outputs Template
outputs_template.description: Static outputs list to attach to each event.

fail_on_collector_error.label: Fail on Collector Error
fail_on_collector_error.description: If true, fail the run when the collector is unreachable. Default false (best-effort emit, log warning).
